name: purefishing-sftp-mirror
description: Railway-friendly SFTP mirror with timestamped snapshots and a dashboard.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check alerting.js && node --check config.js && node --check database.js && node --check renderDashboard.js && node --check renderDesktopDashboard.js && node --check scheduler.js && node --check sftpMirror.js && node --check time.js && node --check xmlProcessor.js
